zh.lifeSummary: 當William Dormer於大約1448年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾韋斯特 維可姆時，他的父親Geoffrey Dormer IV32歲，母親Alice Ursulla Collingridge32歲。他於大約1470年與Agnes Launcelyn在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和12個女兒的父母。他去世於1506年10月7日之前在英國巴金哈姆爾韋斯特 維可姆，埋葬在英國巴金哈姆爾韋斯特 維可姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Dormer于大约1448年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾韋斯特 維可姆时，他的父亲Geoffrey Dormer IV32岁，母亲Alice Ursulla Collingridge32岁。他于大约1470年与Agnes Launcelyn在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和12个女儿的父母。他去世于1506年10月7日之前在英国巴金哈姆爾韋斯特 維可姆，埋葬在英国巴金哈姆爾韋斯特 維可姆。

nameMeanings.name: Dormer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): nickname for a lazy man or a sleepyhead from Old French dormeur ‘sleeper, sluggard’ (from Latin dormitor, from dormire ‘to sleep’).

Irish (Kilkenny): when not of the same origin as 1 above, this is a shortened Anglicized form of the Donegal name Ó Díorma, a shortened form of Ó Duibhdhíormaigh ‘descendant of Duibhdhíormach’, a personal name composed of Gaelic dubh ‘black’ + díormach ‘trooper’.
German (Dörmer): occupational name for a watchman on a tower (of a castle or town), from an agent derivative of Middle Low German torn or Middle High German turn ‘tower’. Compare Dermer and Dorner .

variants.name: Dermer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hersh, Pinchas, Yaffa.
German: from an old personal name, Terrimar, a variant of Därr (see Darr ).
German: variant of Dörmer (see Dormer ), an occupational name for a watchman, someone who manned a tower. Compare Derner .

variants.name: Dearmond
meanings: Irish: variant of Dermond, a shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Duibhdhiorma ‘descendant of Duibhdhiorma’ a personal name meaning ‘black trooper’ (see Dormer 2). There has been some confusion between the personal names Duibhdhiorma and Diarmaid, so that Dearmond alternates with McDermott . See also Dearman 2.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When William Dormer was born about 1448, in West Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, England, his father, Geoffrey Dormer IV, was 32 and his mother, Alice Ursulla Collingridge, was 32. He married Agnes Launcelyn about 1470, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 12 daughters. He died before 7 October 1506, in West Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, England, and was buried in West Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Dormer est né environ 1448, à West Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Geoffrey Dormer IV, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Alice Ursulla Collingridge, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Launcelyn environ 1470, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 12 filles. Il est décédé avant 7 octobre 1506, à West Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, et a été enterré à West Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: William Dormerが約1448年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアウエスト ウイコンベで生まれた時，父Geoffrey Dormer IVは32歳，母Alice Ursulla Collingridgeは32歳であった。約1470年にイギリスでAgnes Launcelynと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と12人の娘の親であった。彼は1506年10月7日以前にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアウエスト ウイコンベで死去し，イギリスブクインガムシュアイアウエスト ウイコンベにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Dormer(이)가 대략 1448년 영국 벅잉함실르 웨스트 윈이코브에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Geoffrey Dormer IV(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Ursulla Collingridge(은)는 32세였다. 그는 대략 1470년 영국에서 Agnes Launcelyn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 열 명 이상의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1506년 10월 7일 이전 영국 벅잉함실르 웨스트 윈이코브에서 사망했으며 영국 벅잉함실르 웨스트 윈이코브에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Agnes Launcelyn aproximadamente 1470, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 12 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Dormer родился около 1448 г. в местности вест викомб, буккингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Geoffrey Dormer IV было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Ursulla Collingridge, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Launcelyn около 1470 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 12 дочерей. Он умер перед 7 октябрь 1506 г. в местности вест викомб, буккингхамшир, Англия и был похоронен в местности вест викомб, буккингхамшир, Англия.
